roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Design, develop, and maintain scalable software systems. Work across the full development lifecycle from requirements to deployment. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products.

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
roles.description: Build responsive and performant user interfaces for web applications. Translate UI/UX designs into clean, maintainable code. Optimize for cross-browser compatibility and accessibility.

roles.title: Backend Engineer
roles.description: Design and build server-side systems, APIs, and databases. Ensure reliability, scalability, and security of backend services. Integrate with third-party services and internal microservices.

roles.title: Full Stack Engineer
roles.description: Develop both client-side and server-side components of web applications. Own features end-to-end from database schema to UI. Bridge the gap between frontend and backend teams.

roles.title: Systems Engineer
roles.description: Design and maintain complex software and hardware systems. Ensure system reliability, performance, and scalability. Work on low-level systems, networking, and distributed infrastructure.

roles.title: Embedded Software Engineer
roles.description: Develop software for embedded systems and hardware devices. Write low-level firmware and drivers. Optimize performance for resource-constrained environments.

roles.title: Data Scientist
roles.description: Analyze large datasets to extract actionable insights and build predictive models. Apply statistical methods and machine learning techniques to solve business problems. Communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders.

roles.title: Machine Learning Engineer
roles.description: Build, train, and deploy machine learning models at scale. Design ML pipelines and infrastructure for production environments. Bridge the gap between data science research and engineering systems.

roles.title: Data Engineer
roles.description: Build and maintain data pipelines, warehouses, and ETL processes. Ensure data quality, availability, and reliability across the organization. Enable data teams to access clean, structured data at scale.

roles.title: AI Research Engineer
roles.description: Conduct applied AI research and implement novel algorithms and architectures. Publish findings and translate research into production-ready systems. Stay current with the latest advances in AI/ML literature.

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.description: Collect, clean, and analyze data to support business decisions. Create dashboards and visualizations to communicate insights. Work closely with product and business teams.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Automate infrastructure provisioning, deployment pipelines, and monitoring. Bridge the gap between development and operations. Ensure reliability and scalability of production systems.

roles.title: Site Reliability Engineer
roles.description: Ensure high availability and performance of production systems. Define and enforce SLOs, SLAs, and error budgets. Reduce toil through automation and improve system observability.

roles.title: Cloud Engineer
roles.description: Design, implement, and manage cloud infrastructure across AWS, Azure, or GCP. Ensure security, scalability, and cost efficiency of cloud resources. Migrate on-premise workloads to the cloud.

roles.title: Platform Engineer
roles.description: Build and maintain internal developer platforms and tooling. Abstract infrastructure complexity so product teams can ship faster. Own the developer experience and internal platform reliability.

roles.title: Infrastructure Engineer
roles.description: Design and manage physical and virtual infrastructure including servers, networks, and storage systems. Ensure uptime, security, and performance of core IT infrastructure.

roles.title: Android Engineer
roles.description: Design and develop Android applications with a focus on performance, usability, and reliability. Integrate with REST APIs and backend services. Publish and maintain apps on the Google Play Store.

roles.title: iOS Engineer
roles.description: Build and maintain iOS applications using Swift and Apple frameworks. Ensure smooth UX across iPhone and iPad devices. Work closely with designers and backend engineers.

roles.title: Security Engineer
roles.description: Design and implement security controls, tools, and processes to protect systems and data. Perform threat modeling, vulnerability assessments, and penetration testing. Respond to security incidents and improve overall posture.

roles.title: Application Security Engineer
roles.description: Embed security into the software development lifecycle. Review code for vulnerabilities, integrate security testing into CI/CD pipelines, and educate developers on secure coding practices.

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.description: Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap. Work with engineering, design, and business stakeholders to deliver customer value. Prioritize features based on data and user feedback.

roles.title: Technical Program Manager
roles.description: Lead large-scale technical programs across multiple engineering teams. Manage risks, dependencies, timelines, and stakeholder communication. Drive alignment between technical and business objectives.

roles.title: Engineering Manager
roles.description: Lead and grow a team of software engineers. Set technical direction, manage performance, and foster a culture of excellence. Balance people management with technical decision-making.

roles.title: Blockchain Engineer
roles.description: Design and develop decentralized applications and smart contracts. Build blockchain infrastructure and integrate with DeFi protocols. Ensure security and correctness of on-chain logic.

roles.title: Game Developer
roles.description: Design and develop video games across PC, console, or mobile platforms. Implement game mechanics, physics, rendering, and AI systems. Optimize for performance and player experience.

roles.title: QA/Test Engineer
roles.description: Design and execute test plans to ensure software quality. Build automated test frameworks and integrate testing into CI/CD pipelines. Identify, track, and verify defects.

roles.title: UI/UX Engineer
roles.description: Bridge the gap between design and engineering by implementing pixel-perfect, accessible UI components. Collaborate with designers to create smooth user experiences and maintain design systems.

roles.title: AR/VR Engineer
roles.description: Develop augmented and virtual reality applications and experiences. Build spatial computing features using AR/VR SDKs and 3D rendering engines. Optimize for low latency and high frame rates.
